messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.
This is text window 3 of 3 for the section.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0012",
  "title": "Influencer Marketing",
  "page_index": 18,
  "page_range": "18-20"
}

Section text:
Visit Site

message.content: This section contains only the navigational phrase "Visit Site" and lacks substantive content. Consequently, it cannot answer questions regarding influencer marketing topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. No retrievable facts, data, or informational content are present in this text window.
